name: Butler N
description:
He's one of the butlers serving at the gala and he almost bumps into you! Go easy on him?

(Ok so apparently all I had to do to fix characters not showing up was reset cookies... oops. Anyways here's butler N :D 3/4 on the main cast back on Earth done! That being said Maid J is also coming soon. Anyways leave some feedback or a request if you want!) Murder Drones
